title: Vagabonderne paa Bakkegaarden
writer: Alice O'Fredericks, Jon Iversen, Morten Korch
actors: Poul Reichhardt, Christian Arhoff, Ib Mossin
plot: A world wanderer, who pays for food and coffee with a song, returns to the farm in Denmark he first worked at and fell in love with the farmer's daughter. She's now a widow and mother and her evil brother-in-law is running the farm.
